recipes.title: Avocado Toast with Eggs
recipes.description: A quick and nutritious breakfast featuring creamy avocado on toasted bread topped with perfectly cooked eggs.

steps.instruction: Toast the bread slices until golden brown.
Cut the avocado in half, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Mash the avocado with a fork and season with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Fry eggs to desired doneness.
Spread mashed avocado on toast, top with fried eggs.
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Greek Salad
recipes.description: A refreshing Mediterranean salad with crisp vegetables, feta cheese, and a tangy olive oil dressing.

steps.instruction: Chop cucumber and tomatoes into bite-sized pieces.
Thinly slice the red onion.
Combine vegetables in a large bowl.
Add olives and crumbled feta cheese on top.
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, and oregano. Drizzle over salad.
Toss gently and serve immediately.

Toss gently and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: A classic Italian pasta dish with creamy egg sauce, crispy pancetta, and parmesan cheese.

steps.instruction: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
While pasta cooks, cut pancetta into small cubes and fry until crispy.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs, egg yolks, and grated parmesan.
Reserve 1 cup pasta water, then drain the spaghetti.
Add hot pasta to the pancetta pan, remove from heat.
Quickly stir in egg mixture, tossing constantly. Add pasta water as needed.
Season generously with black pepper and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Chewy, golden chocolate chip cookies with melted chocolate in every bite.

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cream together softened butter and sugars until fluffy.
Beat in eggs one at a time, then add vanilla extract.
Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
Gradually add dry ingredients to wet ingredients.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto baking sheets.
Bake for 9-11 minutes until edges are golden.
Cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to wire rack.

recipes.title: Overnight Oats
recipes.description: Easy no-cook breakfast prepared the night before with oats, milk, and your favorite toppings.

steps.instruction: Combine oats, milk, yogurt, and honey in a jar or container.
Stir in chia seeds.
Cover and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours).
In the morning, stir and top with fresh berries.
Enjoy cold or heated in the microwave for 1-2 minutes.

recipes.title: Chicken Stir-Fry
recipes.description: Quick and healthy Asian-inspired dish with tender chicken and crisp vegetables in a savory sauce.

steps.instruction: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and toss with cornstarch.
Chop broccoli into florets and slice bell peppers.
Mince garlic and grate ginger.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat.
Stir-fry chicken for 5-6 minutes until cooked through. Set aside.
Add vegetables to the wok and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Return chicken to wok, add soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger.
Toss everything together and serve over steamed rice.

recipes.title: Tuna Wrap
recipes.description: Light and satisfying wrap filled with flaky tuna, crisp vegetables, and creamy dressing.

steps.instruction: Drain canned tuna and flake into a bowl.
Mix tuna with mayonnaise.
Shred lettuce, slice tomato, cucumber, and red onion thinly.
Lay tortilla flat and spread tuna mixture down the center.
Top with lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and onion.
Fold in the sides, then roll up tightly from the bottom.
Cut in half diagonally and serve.

recipes.title: Banana Nice Cream
recipes.description: Healthy frozen dessert made from blended frozen bananas - creamy like ice cream but guilt-free.

steps.instruction: Slice bananas into coins and freeze for at least 4 hours before making.
Add frozen banana coins to a food processor.
Pulse until bananas start to break down.
Add cocoa powder, peanut butter, almond milk, and vanilla.
Blend until smooth and creamy, scraping sides as needed.
Serve immediately for soft-serve texture or freeze 30 minutes for firmer texture.
